title: AeroBoots
description: AeroBoots is an advanced jetpack boots plugin for Minecraft 1.21.5 that allows players to fly in a controlled and epic way. With optimized visual effects, realistic rocket sounds, and a strict system without fall damage protection
body:
# 🚀 AeroBoots v1.0.0

## 📖 Description

AeroBoots is an advanced jetpack boots plugin for Minecraft 1.21.5 that allows players to fly in a controlled and epic way. With optimized visual effects, realistic rocket sounds, and a strict system without fall damage protection, it offers a unique and balanced flight experience.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74363575c70d79f247435142c3e6d5ff7f26f2ad.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f078387f076abe38942e6314fb44bca48d28a04.png)

## 📊 System States

🟢 Ready to fly       ➜ Control + Jump available
🔴 On cooldown       ➜ Wait X seconds
🟡 Actively flying   ➜ Controls available
🟠 Low durability    ➜ Less than 100 points
⚪ No boots          ➜ Equip AeroBoots

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa218dd1b89b3d417494445f997ac64cfbdeb87f.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b21abfcdecc0d409ebd77de10ea438b98c45e51e.png)

## 📋 System Information

Version: AeroBoots v2.0.0
Minecraft: 1.21.5+
Dependencies: None required
Compatibility: Oraxen, ItemsAdder

## 🏆 Credits

Developed by: delarosaplay
Version: 2.0.0
Last update: June 2025
